subject: Re: Fwd: FW: Lease Space AYH Marina St. Thomas
body:
go ahead,, negotiate and then check with farkas

----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, February 6, 2007 3:19:19 PM
Subject: Fwd: FW: Lease Space AYH Marina St. Thomas



 

I saw the space with Amerling.  He says the space is great and even 
more than he needs.  However, Chris Petty told us that no smaller space is 
available.  The current tenant is willing to sell the furniture, phones, 
etc. Chris Petty attached the AYH's terms, but, given our new relationship with 
AYH,  I do not know what role, if any, Chris or I have in discussing 
terms.  The space will suit our needs, needs some minor clean up and 
provides us with the ability to acquire existing equipment and set up shop with 
relative ease and quickness.  THe tenant is going to provide me with an 
itemized list of furniture, phones etc that the tenant is willing to sell.  
We could get the space as soon as a week from Friday if we want.  Please 
let me know how you wish for me to proceed and if terms are to be negotiated 
what terms you want me to offer. 

 

Thanks.

 

Darren K. 
Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New 
York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
 
 
Confidentiality 
Notice: This communication and any attachments contain information from Darren 
K. Indyke, Esq. that constitute attorney work product or that are otherwise 
confidential and/or privileged. Except for personal use by the intended 
recipient, or as expressly authorized by the sender, any person who receives 
this information is prohibited from disclosing, copying, distributing, and/or 
using it. If you have received this communication in error, please immediately 
delete it and all copies, and promptly notify the sender at the above telephone 
number or electronic mail address. Nothing in this communication is intended to 
operate as an electronic signature under applicable 
law.

Here you go
 

  
 

He can show you the space today if you
like
 

  
 



Emad Hanna
 

Project Controller
 

NES, LLC
 

457 Madison Ave
 

New
  York, NY 10022
 

'  
(212) 891-6414
 

Fax (212) 750-2408
 

› ehanna@nysgmail.com
 

 
 













From: Chris Petty [mailto:chris@ayhmarina.biz] 

Sent: Tuesday, February 06, 2007
2:01 PM

To: Emad Hanna

Cc: Wesley Roth; Whyte, Robin

Subject: Lease Space AYH Marina
St. Thomas
 




  
 

Hello Mr. Hanna,

It has come to my attention that Mr. Epstein is looking for additional office
space in our mall.  I have only the following space available:
 


 Suite A2-7 located on the second floor of
     A-Building, above Burrito Bay Deli 
 885 square feet.  The ceilings are vaulted
     and a comparable space has been lofted to create an additional 500 square
     feet 
 $32.00 per square foot base rent 
 $4.25 per square foot base CAM Fee 
 $25.00 monthly garbage fee 
 2 months security deposit 
 5% or CPI-U index  annual increase 
 2 non exclusive parking passes 


The space is built out as an office but could require
additional build out to suit your needs.  Please let me know if you would
like some digital photos or one of your associates in St. Thomas would like to
view the space.

Best Regards,

Chris

Hello Mr. Hanna,
It has come to my attention that Mr. Epstein is looking for additional office space in our mall.  I have only the following space available:

  • Suite A2-7 located on the second floor of A-Building, above Burrito Bay Deli
  • 885 square feet.  The ceilings are vaulted and a comparable space has been lofted to create an additional 500 square feet
  • $32.00 per square foot base rent
  • $4.25 per square foot base CAM Fee
  • $25.00 monthly garbage fee
  • 2 months security deposit
  • 5% or CPI-U index  annual increase
  • 2 non exclusive parking passes

The space is built out as an office but could require additional build out to suit your needs.  Please let me know if you would like some digital photos or one of your associates in St. Thomas would like to view the space.
Best Regards,
